stepNotSkippable: Only step 3 and step 4 can be skipped.
emailInUse: This email is already in use by another account.
cannotDeleteSuperAdmin: Super admin accounts cannot be deleted.
rolesNotFound: One or more roles do not exist.
userNotBanned: This user is not currently banned.
roleNotFoundPartial: One or more roles do not exist.
trigger.allergies.message: Tell us about your allergies so we can keep recommendations safe for you.
trigger.allergies.title: Do you have any food allergies?
trigger.dietaryRestrictions.message: Vegetarian, low-salt, no spicy food — let us know so we can filter recommendations.
trigger.dietaryRestrictions.title: Any foods you avoid?
trigger.cookingSkill.message: Share your cooking skill so we can suggest recipes that fit your level.
trigger.cookingSkill.title: How would you describe your cooking skill?
trigger.budget.message: Help us recommend foods that match your budget.
trigger.budget.title: What's your food budget like?
trigger.healthConditions.message: Conditions like diabetes or hypertension help us keep recommendations safe.
trigger.healthConditions.title: Any health conditions to consider?
trigger.swapPreference.message: We've noticed you keep swapping for similar foods — would you like to confirm this preference?
trigger.swapPreference.title: You seem to prefer "{{category}}" foods
trigger.exercise.title: Tell us about your exercise habits
trigger.exercise.message: Active users have different calorie and protein needs — adding exercise info improves recommendations.
trigger.completeness.title: Improve recommendation accuracy by completing your profile
trigger.completeness.message: Profile is {{percent}}% complete — finishing it can improve recommendation accuracy by ~30%.
trigger.goalReached.title: Goal almost reached!
trigger.goalReached.message: You've completed {{percent}}% of your goal — would you like to set a new one?
trigger.goalPlateau.title: Progress seems to be stalling
trigger.goalPlateau.message: Your weight/metrics haven't moved much recently — adjust the goal speed or revisit your plan?
trigger.tasteIntensity.title: We can analyze your taste preferences
trigger.tasteIntensity.message: You've logged {{count}} meals — we can infer your taste preferences automatically for sharper recommendations.
goal.reachedSwitchToMaintain: Congrats! You've reached your goal weight — switching to maintenance mode is recommended.
goal.slowProgressSwitchToRelaxed: Progress is a bit slow. Try the relaxed pace — long-term consistency matters most.
goal.consolidateWithMaintain: You've reached your target weight. Maintenance mode helps you lock in the results.
profile.declaredGoalConflictsObservedInt: Declared goal conflicts with observed intake.
profile.highDeclaredActivityLowComplianc: High declared activity but low compliance.
profile.declaredCookHighTakeoutFrequency: Declared as home cook but high takeout frequency.

field.reason.healthConditions: Adapts recommendations to your health condition.
field.reason.constraintTightness: Adjusts how strict recommendation constraints are.
field.reason.activityCalories: Active users have different caloric needs.
